strategy: Join on time to deny him the free Steal Pips, and plan to win before or right at Round 5, when he throws a multi-target Wild Bolt at everyone.
He is stunable and beguilable, so a stun or beguile is a strong way to skip his Wild Bolt turn or his Dark Fiend.
Watch his Shadow pips: at two pips he casts a self-buffed Dark Fiend with a +40% Shadowblade, so try to finish him before he charges it.
He resists Storm 30% and takes 15% more from Myth, so hit with Myth, stack blades, and burst inside five Rounds.
cheatNotes: A late-joining wizard lets him cast a Balance Steal Pips for 3 pips.
At the end of Round 5 he hits all wizards with a multi-target Wild Bolt.
Once he has two Shadow pips he casts Dark Fiend with +20% backlash and gives himself a +40% Shadowblade.
